scripts.build: python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt && npm run data:cover:all && vite build && node scripts/create-static-route-entrypoints.mjs && node scripts/create-sitemap.mjs && npm run seo:audit && node scripts/inject-adsense-meta.mjs && node scripts/apply-public-branding.mjs
scripts.data:cover:all: npm run data:download && npm run data:cover:areas && npm run data:cover:trends && npm run data:build
